faq_candidates.question: What payment methods does Aqaar accept for rent?
faq_candidates.answer: We accept: ; Post-dated cheques (for the agreed number of installments); Online payments via the Aqaar Ajman mobile app

faq_candidates.question: How can I hand over my cheques if I lease or renew my contract online?
faq_candidates.answer: ; You can drop off your cheques in person at the Aqaar office during business hours.; Alternatively, you can choose a free courier pickup service from anywhere in the UAE.

faq_candidates.question: How do I report a maintenance issue?
faq_candidates.answer: Tenants can report maintenance requests through the Aqaar Ajman mobile app or via the website , allowing easy tracking and direct communication with our maintenance team.

faq_candidates.question: Is AC maintenance included in my lease?
faq_candidates.answer: For some properties, AC maintenance is included . Please check your lease agreement for details.

faq_candidates.question: Is there any cost for the initial maintenance, and how long does it take?
faq_candidates.answer: ; The initial maintenance is free of cost and includes essential fixes required before move-in.; It will be completed within 20 days from the date of signing the lease contract.; Please note that the lease contract will officially start after 20 days from the signing date.

faq_candidates.question: What is the notice period for vacating a unit?
faq_candidates.answer: Tenants must provide a 60-day written notice before the lease expiration if they do not wish to renew.

faq_candidates.question: Is my lease contract registered with ARRA?
faq_candidates.answer: Yes, all lease agreements are registered with Ajman Real Estate Regulatory Agency (ARRA) to ensure compliance with local rental laws.

faq_candidates.question: How do I contact Aqaar for leasing inquiries?
faq_candidates.answer: You can reach us through: ; Website : www.aqaar.com ; Mobile App : Aqaar Ajman ; Leasing Office : 1st Floor, Grand Mall - Sheikh Khalifa Bin Zayed St - Ajman, UAE ; Customer Support : ; Phone / WhatsApp : 600515155 ; Email : info@aqaar.com
